tasks.title: Extension: DashboardCoordinator skeleton + runMutation + SideEffectBus
tasks.summary: Introduce a host-side DashboardCoordinator as the single entry for dashboard intents. Owns the drawer mutation critical section (kit calls only), releases locks before side effects, and delegates toasts/refresh via a non-blocking SideEffectBus. Foundation for Option 1 intent/snapshot architecture after 0.99.6 drawer submit lock fixes.
tasks.approach: Add dashboard-coordinator.ts with dispatch(intent), runMutation(async fn), emitSnapshot(), and dashboard-side-effects.ts for fire-and-forget notify/refresh/kitStateChanged. Wire DashboardViewProvider to construct coordinator with CommandClient, DashboardRefreshController, DrawerSessionController deps. runMutation: beginDashboardMutationRefreshHold → await fn → finally release holds + emit snapshot. Do not migrate all drawer flows yet — scaffold + unit tests only.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardCoordinator.runMutation runs kit work while refresh is paused and always releases mutation hold in finally even when fn throws
SideEffectBus.notify / scheduleRefresh / notifyKitChanged never use await on vscode.window or pushUpdate from inside runMutation
Coordinator emits a typed DashboardHostSnapshot (schemaVersion 1) with drawer slice from DrawerSessionController
Unit tests cover: successful mutation releases hold; thrown mutation still releases hold; side effect methods are invoked only after runMutation completes
pnpm run compile && pnpm run test in extensions/cursor-workflow-cannon pass

tasks.title: Extension: Wire drawerSubmit and drawerCancel through DashboardCoordinator
tasks.summary: Route webview drawerSubmit and drawerCancel messages through DashboardCoordinator.dispatch so kit mutations and lock release follow one path. Remove duplicate host guard patterns where coordinator owns submitting state.
tasks.approach: Define DashboardIntent union: drawer.submit, drawer.cancel. Map existing DashboardViewProvider message handler to coordinator.dispatch. Move beginDrawerSubmitRefreshHold/endDrawerSubmitRefreshHold inside coordinator.runMutation. handleDrawerSubmit becomes coordinator-internal or injected handler registry keyed by dashboardDrawerSession.kind. Success/error toasts go through SideEffectBus after runMutation, not notifyAfterDrawerClosed await.
acceptanceCriteria: drawerSubmit and drawerCancel webview messages invoke coordinator.dispatch only (no parallel lock paths)
Back-to-back Accept repro: second submit is processed while first success toast may still be visible (no drawerSubmit ignored while webview busy)
Validation errors post wcDrawerState / snapshot with step validation-error without holding submit lock after emit
Regression: dashboard-ui-interaction-locks tests updated for coordinator wiring
Extension test suite passes

tasks.title: Extension: wcHostSnapshot webview channel + applyHostSnapshot
tasks.summary: Add a single host→webview snapshot message (wcHostSnapshot) so drawer busy/validation state is derived from host truth. Remove webview drawerSubmitInFlight optimistic lock; gate submit clicks on snapshot.drawer.busy only.
tasks.approach: Extend DashboardHostSnapshot with drawer + interaction.refreshBusy. Coordinator.emitSnapshot posts { type: wcHostSnapshot, snapshot }. In dashboard-webview-client.ts add applyHostSnapshot(snapshot) merging applyWcDrawerState behavior. Submit click handler: if snapshot.drawer.busy return; else post intent drawer.submit. Keep wcDrawerOpen for initial HTML injection only; follow with initial snapshot. Deprecate wcDrawerProgress, wcDrawerValidation, wcDrawerClose for drawer UX (compat shim one release if needed).
acceptanceCriteria: Webview submit button disabled or no-op when snapshot.drawer.busy === true
No drawerSubmitInFlight variable in dashboard-webview-client.ts (grep clean)
Host emits wcHostSnapshot on drawer open, submitting, validation-error, idle transitions
Manual or automated test: open accept drawer → submit → snapshot shows submitting then idle/closed without stale busy lock
Extension tests pass

tasks.title: Extension: Migrate accept-proposed and batch accept drawers to coordinator
tasks.summary: Move accept-proposed single and batch handleDrawerSubmit paths onto DashboardCoordinator mutation + SideEffectBus so run-transition and assign-task-phase never overlap with toast or refresh holds. Primary user-facing fix validation for consecutive Accept on proposed tasks.
tasks.approach: Register accept-proposed session handler on coordinator. Single accept: runMutation with run-transition then assign-task-phase; on success SideEffectBus.notify + scheduleRefresh(light). Batch accept: one runMutation wrapping loop; aggregate failures; single notify. Remove notifyAfterDrawerClosed await pattern from these paths. Ensure expectedPlanningGenerationArgs passed inside mutation only.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept T1 then Accept T2 on proposed queue without hang (manual QA steps documented in PR)
assign-task-phase failure shows error toast via SideEffectBus without blocking second submit
Batch accept-all completes with progress labels driven by snapshot submitting step
No await vscode.window.showInformationMessage inside runMutation or handleDrawerSubmit accept paths
Extension tests pass; pnpm run test green

tasks.title: Extension: Remove legacy drawer postMessage types and dashboardDrawerSubmitInFlight
tasks.summary: Delete redundant host and webview drawer lock flags and legacy message types superseded by wcHostSnapshot. Reduce DashboardViewProvider postMessage surface to intents in / snapshots out.
tasks.approach: Remove dashboardDrawerSubmitInFlight; grep and remove wcDrawerClose, wcDrawerProgress, wcDrawerValidation emission where snapshot covers same UX. Keep wcDrawerOpen for HTML payload only. Update dashboard-ui-interaction-locks.test.mjs and command-client tests if messages referenced. Document breaking change for any external webview consumers (none expected).
acceptanceCriteria: grep dashboardDrawerSubmitInFlight in extension src returns zero matches
grep drawerSubmitInFlight in dashboard-webview-client returns zero matches
Drawer UX still works for accept-proposed, assign-phase, add-wishlist smoke paths
Regression tests updated; extension test suite passes

tasks.title: Extension: Derive dashboard interaction locks from coordinator state
tasks.summary: Replace scattered dashboardInteractionLocks Set and manual setDashboardUiInteraction calls with coordinator-derived InteractionState exposed in wcHostSnapshot. DashboardRefreshController.isDeferred reads coordinator.isMutationActive().
tasks.approach: Add InteractionState { mutationActive, refreshDeferred } to DashboardHostSnapshot. Coordinator sets mutationActive for drawer submit and roster mutations. Remove drawer-submit and drawer-busy entries from dashboardInteractionLocks Set where redundant. Refresh button spinner uses snapshot.interaction.refreshBusy. onDeferredCleared fires when mutationActive transitions false.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardRefreshController defers refresh when coordinator reports mutationActive
Refresh button busy state driven from snapshot.interaction.refreshBusy not ad-hoc setUiInteraction
setDashboardUiInteraction drawer-submit/drawer-busy calls removed or reduced to coordinator internals
Add .ai/adrs/ADR-dashboard-intent-snapshot-v1.md documenting R1 critical section, R2 release before side effects, R3 webview never gates submit
Extension tests pass; check stage passes if ADR linked from machine canon
